description: 24 regression prompts migrated from evals.json with FSM state paths, intent classification, and P-code annotations.

evals.name: health-check-09-erp
evals.prompt: 只對 09 erp 跑 health-check。產出 governance stage 1 freeze summary 與 scoped health dashboard，不要任何 write set。
evals.expected_output: A scoped health-check packet for 09 erp that does not propose repository edits.
expectations: The output classifies intent as inspect-only.
The output scopes itself to 09 erp instead of reading the whole repo.
The output does not include a primary-doc write set.
The FSM state transitions from inspecting to closed.

evals.name: order-drift-audit
evals.prompt: 盤點 03 order 在 user stories、PRD、system specs、API contract、tests 與相關 ADR references 之間的 drift。準備一個 low-risk rewrite packet only。
evals.expected_output: A low-risk incremental rewrite packet for 03 order with separated primary and derived write sets.
expectations: The output classifies intent as prepare-packet.
The rewrite packet separates primary-doc and derived-surface write sets.
The output cites evidence from user story, PRD, specs, or API contract files.
The FSM state transitions to ready_for_review.

evals.name: billing-formula-conflict
evals.prompt: 比對 05 billing 的對帳結算語意與文檔/code/tests。如果差異是公式層級而非僅是改名，開一個 decision packet 並在 rewrite 前停下。
evals.expected_output: A 05 billing decision-intake packet that classifies the issue as a formula or docs-vs-runtime conflict and stops before execution.
expectations: The output opens a decision packet instead of a rewrite packet if formula semantics differ.
The output classifies the issue as formula-or-logic or docs-vs-runtime.
The output emits PAUSE: P-DESIGN-FORMULA.
The output asks a concrete human question with a recommended default.
The output stops before repository execution.

evals.name: fee-rate-unit-conflict
evals.prompt: 盤點 reconciliation_fee_rate 欄位語意，橫跨 05 billing 的後台對帳政策文檔與 02 product 的價格表 runtime surfaces。如果單位或 compatibility boundary 還沒凍結，在任何 rewrite 前產出 decision packet。
evals.expected_output: A preflight packet that detects unit-contract or lifecycle/compatibility drift and proposes a concrete freeze question.
expectations: The output identifies a unit-contract or lifecycle-or-compatibility conflict.
The output emits PAUSE: P-DESIGN-UNIT.
The output distinguishes setup-time semantics from settlement-time semantics.
The output recommends a boundary such as dual-read/write-new or compatibility-only.

evals.name: acceptance-adr-high-risk
evals.prompt: 準備一個 acceptance ADR cluster review，涵蓋 04 acceptance 加上 ADR-008 與 ADR-027。把這當作 high-risk governance run，產出 review packet。
evals.expected_output: A high-risk review packet that requires external Claude review before execution.
expectations: The output classifies intent as prepare-packet.
The output marks the run as high-risk.
The output generates a review packet suitable for external Claude review.
The output does not execute changes without approval.
If review artifact is missing, emits PAUSE: P-REVIEW-MISSING.

evals.name: erp-ownership-conflict
evals.prompt: 檢視 09 erp 的 export references，判斷 /admin/exports 是否仍是 09 erp 的 active scope。如果 ownership 尚未凍結，在 rewrite 前先問裁決。
evals.expected_output: A scope-or-ownership decision packet with a concrete question, options, and a recommended default.
expectations: The output classifies the issue as scope-or-ownership.
The output emits PAUSE: P-DESIGN-OWNERSHIP.
The output asks whether the capability stays in active scope or is removed/relocated.
The output provides execution impact for each option.

evals.name: billing-adr-cluster
evals.prompt: 解決 billing ADR cluster，涉及 ADR-023、ADR-025、ADR-026、ADR-028 與 02 product 的 references，假設 canonical 對帳費率階梯（fee ladder）已核准。產出含 ADR impacts 與 vocabulary checks 的 rewrite packet。
evals.expected_output: A billing cluster rewrite packet that identifies ADR relationships, deprecated aliases, and resolved decision dependencies.
expectations: The output classifies intent as prepare-packet.
The output treats billing as an ADR cluster scope.
The output lists ADR impacts.
The output identifies deprecated rate terminology without reopening already-frozen decisions.
The FSM state transitions to ready_for_review.

evals.name: full-governance-dry-run
evals.prompt: 幫 03 order、05 billing、04 acceptance、02 product 起草一個 full-governance dry run。把工作切成 scoped packets 並描述各 stage gates，但不執行。
evals.expected_output: A full-governance dry run that partitions work into multiple scopes and does not attempt a single full-repo scan.
expectations: The output classifies intent as prepare-packet.
The output segments the work into multiple scoped packets.
The output marks the run as high-risk.
The output includes a preflight decision queue before any rewrite scope.
The output stops at the planning/review stage.
The FSM state transitions to ready_for_review (multi-scope).

evals.name: docs-vs-runtime-boundary
evals.prompt: 比對目前 05 billing 對帳單 snapshot 文檔與 runtime 欄位。如果文檔已經 canonical 但 runtime 還在寫舊 keys，產出一個帶 compatibility boundary 的 docs-vs-runtime packet，而不是把所有東西全部重寫。
evals.expected_output: A docs-vs-runtime preflight packet that freezes a compatibility boundary such as dual-read/write-new.
expectations: The output classifies the conflict as docs-vs-runtime.
The output emits PAUSE: P-COMPAT-BOUNDARY.
The output distinguishes truth-layer hardening from runtime migration.
The output fences legacy keys behind an explicit compatibility rule.

evals.name: execution-packet-draft
evals.prompt: 假設 cleanup packet 已經 reviewed、沒有殘留 product blockers，而且 Family A.1 加 Family B 都有明確的 file targets。起草一個 execution packet，而不是再一份 review artifact。
evals.expected_output: An execution packet with exact write set, verification commands, rollback steps, and explicit approval text.
expectations: The output classifies intent as execute-within-approval.
The output produces an execution packet rather than another review-only packet.
The output includes exact write sets and rollback or downgrade steps.
The output distinguishes draft approval from execution approval.
The FSM state transitions to ready_for_execution_approval.

evals.name: approved-execution-proceed
evals.prompt: 你已經有 Cleanup Packet A 的 approved execution packet。在核准的 family boundary 內推進，除非出現新 blocker，否則不要重開 planning。
evals.expected_output: A response that executes or clearly enters execution mode, without creating a new plan or review artifact unless it identifies a genuinely new blocker.
expectations: The output classifies intent as execute-within-approval.
The output does not reopen a new planning loop without a new blocker.
The output respects the existing approved execution boundary.
The output only stops if it identifies a new blocker and names it concretely.
The FSM state transitions to executing.

evals.name: closeout-cleanup
evals.prompt: 這個 run 已 closed，review comments 已吸收進 run.md 與 handoff.md，compact checkpoint 也更新了。把過時的 review packets 從 HEAD 清掉，而不是保留它們當 archive。
evals.expected_output: A closeout response that collapses conclusions into canonical docs and deletes absorbed transient packets from HEAD.
expectations: The output classifies intent as closeout-only.
The output treats git history as the archive layer rather than keeping all packets in HEAD.
The output deletes or marks for deletion absorbed transient packets.
The output keeps only the minimal active artifact set after closeout.
The FSM state transitions to closed.

evals.name: double-defer-legacy
evals.prompt: legacy 欄位 `commission_rate` 在上一個 packet 被 deferred，新 packet 又寫「keep for now」。停掉這個迴圈，強制一個明確的 disposition，含 owner、next packet 與 exit trigger。
evals.expected_output: A response that refuses a second vague defer and forces execute-now, permanent-compatibility, retire, or a decision packet.
expectations: The output does not allow a second vague defer.
The output emits PAUSE: P-LEGACY-VAGUE-DEFER.
The output requires an explicit legacy disposition and exit trigger.
The output names the next packet or owner if defer-once is used.
The FSM state transitions to needs_decision.

evals.name: patch-failure-reread
evals.prompt: 你預期 `backend/billing-service-fastapi/app/services/reconciliation_service.py` 內含某個 alias path，但 apply_patch 失敗了。重新讀實際檔案，依當前 repo state 更新 execution packet，再 patch。
evals.expected_output: A repo-state-first response that re-reads the file, updates assumptions, and avoids reasoning from expectation alone.
expectations: The output re-reads actual repo state after patch mismatch.
The output emits PAUSE: P-STATE-EXPECTED.
The output updates the write set or packet assumptions based on observed code.
The output does not continue from the original incorrect expectation.
The FSM state transitions to execution_gate_blocked.

evals.name: compact-triage
evals.prompt: 重疊 scope 內有 `plan.md`、`handoff.md` 與兩個 compact checkpoints。全部讀過，把每個 artifact 分類為 in-progress、completed-integrate-then-delete、completed-stale-delete 或 todo-merge-forward，如果 run 還 active 就只保留最新的 compact。
evals.expected_output: A lifecycle-aware governance response that treats compacts as required intake, merges unfinished items forward, and prunes older checkpoints from HEAD.
expectations: The output reads prior compacts as intake instead of ignoring them.
The output classifies artifacts into the four lifecycle action classes.
The output keeps at most one latest compact for an active run.
The output merges still-open items from older compacts into the latest compact.

evals.name: final-compact-removal
evals.prompt: 這個 run 已完全 closed，所有 completed 資訊都已吸收進 canonical docs，最後一個 compact 只是重複 current gate。把最後這個 compact 移除，不要留在 HEAD。
evals.expected_output: A closeout response that leaves the run with zero retained compacts after final absorption.
expectations: The output classifies intent as closeout-only.
The output recognizes that a closed run should retain zero compacts.
The output deletes the final compact after absorption.
The output keeps canonical docs as the only durable source in HEAD.
The FSM state transitions to closed.

evals.name: retention-rules
evals.prompt: 為整個 governance repo 設計 retention rules。在決定保留或刪除之前，先區分 canonical docs、run state docs、transient packets 與 durable evidence。
evals.expected_output: A repo-level governance response that classifies artifacts by role first, but only allows run-local operating state while a run is active and forces promotion or deletion at closeout.
expectations: The output classifies intent as inspect-only.
The output distinguishes artifact role from lifecycle action.
The output does not apply packet deletion rules directly to canonical docs.
The output defines stricter retention limits for transient work artifacts than for active operating-state docs.
The output does not preserve closed-run local run.md or handoff.md as long-term residue.
The output mentions content residency as part of the retention classification framework.
The FSM state transitions to closed.

evals.name: artifact-metadata
evals.prompt: 新建一個 cleanup execution packet。包含必要的 artifact metadata，讓後續 run 能在無需猜測下決定 retain、absorb-delete、merge-forward 或 delete。
evals.expected_output: An execution packet draft that includes the required artifact metadata contract fields.
expectations: The output classifies intent as prepare-packet.
The output includes artifact_role, run_id, status, lifecycle_action, owner, and source_of_truth.
The output uses lifecycle action values that match the skill contract.
The output makes later closeout decisions easier rather than leaving retention ambiguous.
The FSM state transitions to ready_for_review.

evals.name: operating-state-drift
evals.prompt: README 還指向 `cc25`，但 run 與 handoff 已經寫 `cc27` 而且 Packet B 是 current gate。在起草任何新 packet 前先 reconcile operating state。
evals.expected_output: A governance response that treats this as an operating-state drift, updates the active path, and blocks new packet drafting until README, run, handoff, and retained compact agree.
expectations: The output classifies intent as execute-within-approval.
The output applies operating-state precedence (run.md frontmatter > handoff > compact > README).
The output fixes the active path mismatch before creating a new packet.
The output names the reconciled latest compact and current gate explicitly.
The FSM state transitions from execution_gate_blocked to ready_for_execution_approval.

evals.name: closed-run-cleanup
evals.prompt: 一個 closed run 還留著 rewrite.md、review.md、claude-review-packet.md 與指向舊 compacts 的 active links。執行 closeout：吸收任何剩餘的 durable knowledge、刪除 transient artifacts、清掃 stale references。
evals.expected_output: A closeout response that promotes any durable knowledge out of the run-local workspace, deletes run-local artifacts, sweeps stale references, and leaves a governance-ledger entry as the closeout record.
expectations: The output classifies intent as closeout-only.
The output does not leave closed-run transient artifacts in HEAD.
The output sweeps stale active references before declaring closeout complete.
The output distinguishes promotable durable knowledge from transient work artifacts.
The output does not leave closed-run run.md or handoff.md in HEAD.
The FSM state transitions to closed.

evals.name: execution-start-gate
evals.prompt: 使用者說了 `Approved: Commercial Cleanup Execution Packet B`，但 packet、handoff、compact 與 README 都還寫 `review-ready`。先不要 patch。記錄 approval receipt、reconcile state、更新 active path，然後才宣告 execution 可以開始。
evals.expected_output: An execution-start response that records the approval in-repo, updates operating-state artifacts, and treats execution as blocked until that work is done.
expectations: The output classifies intent as execute-within-approval.
The output records the exact execution approval wording instead of relying on conversation memory.
The output updates run/handoff/latest compact/README before patching.
The output performs double-write (frontmatter + Markdown body).
The output changes status away from review-ready before execution starts.
The FSM state transitions to executing.
If approval receipt is missing, emits PAUSE: P-WRITE-UNAPPROVED.

evals.name: approval-with-hold
evals.prompt: execution approval 帶一個 hold boundary：`Approved: Execute Cleanup Packet B, hold notification-service`。記錄 approval receipt，並在 execution-start update 中讓 hold 明確化，使 write set 不能 silently 擴張。
evals.expected_output: An execution-start update that captures exact approval text, hold scope, active-path reconciliation, and execution boundary before implementation begins.
expectations: The output classifies intent as execute-within-approval.
The output preserves the exact approval wording including the hold.
The output records the approved hold in the execution-start receipt.
The output narrows the executable write set to match the recorded approval.
The output performs double-write (frontmatter + Markdown body).
The FSM state transitions to executing.

evals.name: zero-residue-closeout
evals.prompt: 這個 run 已 closed。它的資料夾裡只剩 run.md、handoff.md 與 stage-0-audit.md。把可重用的 compatibility strategy promote 進 runbook，寫一筆 governance-ledger closeout entry，移除 run-local 檔案，並清掉 README 的 active link。
evals.expected_output: A zero-residue closeout response that leaves no run-local residue for the closed run and keeps only promoted knowledge plus the governance ledger.
expectations: The output classifies intent as closeout-only.
The output promotes durable knowledge out of the closed run directory before deletion.
The output deletes closed-run run.md and handoff.md instead of preserving them as long-term operating-state.
The output updates README and governance-ledger rather than keeping the closed run as an active path.
The FSM state transitions to closed.

evals.name: content-residency-active-plan
evals.prompt: 對 docs/plans/20260606-billing-reconciliation/run.md 跑 health-check。它是一個 Active plan，約 920 行，大約 85% 是 canonical-business-truth 與 technical-contract-truth 內容。
evals.expected_output: A health-check that performs section-level classification, finds ≥30% non-plan content, reclassifies as actionable-drift (content-residency), and recommends harvest instead of closing.
expectations: The output classifies intent as inspect-only.
The output performs section-level ownership classification on the docs/plans/ file.
The output identifies ≥30% non-execution-sequencing content (canonical-business-truth / technical-contract-truth).
The output reclassifies the file as actionable-drift with content-residency subtype.
The output recommends knowledge-harvest mode as next step.
The output does NOT transition to closed.
The output outputs a section-level disposition table with candidate canonical homes.
The output includes a per-section ownership breakdown table showing the non-plan-content ratio exceeds 30%.
anti_expectations: The output classifies the file as healthy.
The output transitions FSM to closed.
The output skips content residency check for the docs/plans/ file.
The output produces a write set or modifies any files.

evals.name: harvest-source-disposition
evals.prompt: 對 docs/plans/20260520-order-statemachine/extraction-report.md 跑的 health-check 結果是 fail（35% non-plan）。使用者說「清乾淨」。轉成 knowledge-harvest mode。該檔是 Reference + historical-only。產出 section-disposition table、promotion-target-map、執行 source disposition，並更新所有 cross-references。
evals.expected_output: A knowledge-harvest response that produces section-disposition table, moves the source file to docs/references/history/, updates all cross-references, and outputs Completion Summary.
expectations: The output classifies intent as harvest.
The output produces a section-disposition table with retain/promote/absorb+delete per section.
The output produces a promotion-target-map with concrete destination paths.
The output applies source disposition: Reference + historical-only → git mv to docs/references/history/.
The output executes cross-reference cascade: updates README, governance-ledger, task docs, and verifies no broken links.
The output does NOT leave the source file in docs/plans/ after harvest.
The FSM state transitions to closed.
The output produces a Completion Summary matching Mode Completion Protocol.
anti_expectations: The output only extracts content without moving the source file.
The output moves the file without updating cross-references.
The output leaves the source file in docs/plans/.

coverage.note: Eval 25 covers harvest intent with source disposition and cross-reference cascade. needs_scope state is covered by failure-injection fail-07 and fail-08. Eval 24 covers content-residency guard for Active plans in docs/plans/.
